sanitarni.formula: 2×WC s nádržkou 1_4 + 2×WC s nádržkou 1_7 + 3×WC_ZAVES_DURAVIT STARCK3 = 7 raw → 7 after dedup (variant blocks for same fixture position)
sanitarni.source: DXF INSERT block name matching + position deduplication

sanitarni.formula: 2×Umyvadlo 01_8 + 3×Umyvadlo 01_9 + 2×umyvadlo = 7 raw → 7 after dedup (variant blocks for same fixture position)
sanitarni.source: DXF INSERT block name matching + position deduplication

sanitarni.formula: 2×Vana 01_5 = 2 raw → 2 after dedup (variant blocks for same fixture position)
sanitarni.source: DXF INSERT block name matching + position deduplication

sanitarni.formula: 2×Sprch vana_6 = 2 raw → 2 after dedup (variant blocks for same fixture position)
sanitarni.source: DXF INSERT block name matching + position deduplication

sanitarni.formula: 3×drez_2 = 3 raw → 3 after dedup (variant blocks for same fixture position)
sanitarni.source: DXF INSERT block name matching + position deduplication

okna.formula: 3×okno 1.NP vzadu + 2×okno malé vzadu + 1×okno male 3.NP vzadu + 1×okno 3.NP vzadu + 4×okno 2.NP + 3×okno 3.NP + 2×okno 1.NP = 16 ks
okna.split_logic: front (ulice, integrované žaluzie kastlík) = sum of blocks without 'vzadu' = 9; back (zahrada) = sum with 'vzadu' = 7

dvere_vnitrni._note: Vnitřní dveře = LWPOLYLINEs on layer 'SM__dveře' (102 entities). Includes ALL doors and all phases (stav/bourání/návrh) → count is overcounted ~3× per door.
dvere_vnitrni.formula: 102 polylines / ~3 phases / ~2.3 (door symbols per door = leaf + frame + arc) ≈ 15 ks návrh
dvere_vnitrni.source: DXF SM__dveře LWPOLYLINE count with phase + symbol deduplication estimate

vstupni_dvere.source: DXF INSERT 'dveře' + TZ ARS — 'plastové vstupní dveře' x 2

krokve_KR_blocks._note: KR INSERT count is gross — includes krokve + sloupky + námětky combined per HSV-5 analysis. Geometric calc (24 krokví × 6.5 m = 156 bm) used as primary in items.json.

vikyre._note: Vikýře not directly counted in DXF; TZ ARS implies 4 ks based on pohledy.
vikyre.source: TZ ARS dům §4 + count of vikýře references in MTEXT (not implemented exhaustively)

steny._extraction_method: Sum of LINE + LWPOLYLINE lengths per layer (math.hypot for segments)

load_bearing_all_phases._note: Raw sum across all entities on layer. For load-bearing/partitions, includes ALL phases combined (stav + bourání + návrh) — divide by ~3 to estimate single-phase. 'navrh_only_*' layers are návrh-pure.

partitions_all_phases._note: Raw sum across all entities on layer. For load-bearing/partitions, includes ALL phases combined (stav + bourání + návrh) — divide by ~3 to estimate single-phase. 'navrh_only_*' layers are návrh-pure.

navrh_only_thick._note: Raw sum across all entities on layer. For load-bearing/partitions, includes ALL phases combined (stav + bourání + návrh) — divide by ~3 to estimate single-phase. 'navrh_only_*' layers are návrh-pure.

navrh_only_very_thick._note: Raw sum across all entities on layer. For load-bearing/partitions, includes ALL phases combined (stav + bourání + návrh) — divide by ~3 to estimate single-phase. 'navrh_only_*' layers are návrh-pure.

derived_navrh_estimate.formula: 1640.9 m total (all phases) / 3 phases ≈ návrh estimate

plochy_podlah_per_material._classification_logic: Heuristic per Czech RD: koupelna/WC/kuchyně→dlazba, obyt+chodba+pokoj→vinyl, 1.PP→dlazba_sklep, půdní/spací patro→biodeska

results.source: DXF room table m² × heuristic material classification
DXF room table m² × heuristic material classification
DXF room table m² × heuristic material classification

obvod_objektu._note: Closed polygons on SM__03b_tlustá nosné stěny matching zastavěná 80-130 m² + perimeter 30-60 m. May include all 3 phase variants.
obvod_objektu.source: DXF SM__03b_tlustá nosné stěny closed LWPOLYLINEs

strecha.formula: 104.4 m² zastavěná / cos(35.0°) = 127.45 m² sklonový rozvin × 1.15 (přesahy + vikýře) = 146.57 m²
strecha.source: TZ zastavěná 104.4 m² + geometric sklon přepočet

dimensions_summary.source: DXF sklad_DPZ DIMENSION entities + LWPOLYLINE bbox probe

geometry_sklad.formula_IPE180: 7.0 m parking length / 1.0 m rozteč = 7 ks IPE180
geometry_sklad.source: DXF DIMENSION + LWPOLYLINE bbox + TZ rozteč 1000 mm
